← All charges

Elephant Charge 2011

23 October 2011 · 📍 Chifomoshi River Luano Valley

Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Conservation Grants

Funds distributed to conservation organisations from the 2011 charge.

Organisation Amount (ZMW) Purpose
Children in the Wilderness 33,150 Support school visits to parks for conservation education
Chipembele Wildlife Education Trust 25,500 Covering costs of logistics and materials for on site conservation education program
Conservation Lower Zambezi 51,000 Environmental Education Programme support
Conservation South Luangwa 51,000 Annual Conservation Fun Run & Sports Day, anti-snaring/patrols
Game Rangers International 25,500 Towards community conservation education, including local radio programs
Kasanka Trust 26,750 Used for equipment including solar panels, base radio, mast antenna and hand held radios to enhance patrol effectivness
North Luangwa Conservation Programme 37,709 Support of building at a school strategically placed near the park
Project Luangwa 20,700 Selected school children experience 5 days in a lodge in the South Luangwa
Wildlife & Environmental Conservation Society of Zambia 124,980 Support 249 Chongololo clubs and 9,960 members
Total 398,563
Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
elephantcharge.org
